clips.title: Neon Rain
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, present day. A rain-soaked city street at night drenched in pink and blue neon, wet asphalt mirroring the signs, steam rising from a grate. Night, heavy rain. A person in a long dark coat stands mid-street, collar up, looking down the block. Puddles, a flickering sign, distant headlights. High-contrast neon key with deep shadow, teal-and-orange grade. 35mm anamorphic, slow push in. Lens flares, film grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: Last Light
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, old West. A vast desert mesa at sunset, dust drifting, a lone horse tethered. Golden hour, wind. A person in a weathered duster and wide-brim hat stands in silhouette facing the horizon, hand resting near their side. Dry brush, a canteen, long raking shadows. Warm low sun rim-lighting the figure, amber grade. 40mm anamorphic, static wide. Heat haze, film grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: Smoke and Ash
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, 1940s. A bombed-out European street, rubble, a shattered facade, smoke drifting through shafts of light. Overcast, ash falling. A person in a worn field uniform moves low along a broken wall, looking ahead. Cracked cobbles, a fallen sign, distant fire glow. Hard backlight through smoke, desaturated cool grade. 35mm anamorphic, handheld tracking. Embers, heavy grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: The Interrogation
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, 1970s. A bare interrogation room, one steel table, a caged bulb swinging, smoke haze. Night. A person in a rumpled shirt sits leaning back, arms crossed, staring at the door. A tin ashtray, a manila folder, a two-way mirror. Single hard overhead pool of light, deep black surround. 50mm anamorphic, slow dolly in. Volumetric haze, film grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: Grand Descent
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, 1950s. A grand marble staircase in an opulent hall, chandeliers, gilded rails. Evening, glamorous. A person in a flowing red gown descends slowly, one hand trailing the banister. Crystal sconces, a polished marble floor, distant guests softly blurred. Warm chandelier key with soft fill, rich saturated grade. 40mm anamorphic, slow crane move. Bokeh highlights, fine grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: Rooftop Martini
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, present day. A sleek rooftop bar at night, glass balustrade, a glittering skyline beyond. Night, cool. A person in a tailored tuxedo leans on the rail, drink in hand, watching the city. A martini glass, an ice bucket, warm string lights. Cool city glow with a warm rim from the bar, teal-and-orange grade. 35mm anamorphic, slow orbit. Reflections, film grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: God Rays
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, present day. A dense misty forest at dawn, tall trunks, shafts of light cutting through fog. Early morning, still. A person in a hooded travel cloak walks a leaf-strewn path, glancing up at the light. Ferns, a fallen log, drifting mist. Volumetric god rays, cool green grade with warm shafts. 40mm anamorphic, slow side tracking. Atmospheric haze, film grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: Grid at Dawn
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, present day. A misty racetrack pit lane at dawn, a low-slung race car, stacks of tires. Early morning, cold. A person in a race suit stands beside the car, helmet under one arm, looking down the track. Slick tarmac, cones, a pit board. Cool dawn light with warm sodium lamps, muted grade. 35mm anamorphic, slow dolly along the car. Steam, film grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: The Edge
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, present day. A rocky cliff edge over a churning sea, a wall of storm clouds rolling in. Stormy dusk, high wind. A person in a whipping coat stands at the brink facing the storm, fabric streaming. Wet rock, sea spray, a distant lightning flash. Dramatic storm light, desaturated cool grade. 28mm anamorphic, slow push in. Rain streaks, film grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: Blue Note
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, 1960s. A smoky basement jazz club, a spotlit stage, silhouetted patrons at small tables. Night, intimate. A person in a sharp suit stands at a vintage microphone, head tilted, mid-phrase. A brass horn on a stand, a whiskey glass, a red curtain. Single warm spotlight through smoke, moody grade. 50mm anamorphic, slow dolly in. Haze, heavy grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: Two Suns
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, sci-fi future. A vast alien desert of rippled dunes under twin suns, a distant ridge. Harsh daylight. A person in a worn spacesuit stands atop a dune, visor reflecting the two suns, surveying the waste. Footprints, a planted marker, blowing dust. Double-sun rim light, warm desaturated grade. 35mm anamorphic, static wide. Heat shimmer, film grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.

clips.title: The Walkout
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, anamorphic film look, present day. A dark stadium tunnel leading toward a roaring arena, hazy light at the far end. Night. A person in a hooded robe walks toward the light, gloved hands up, head down. Concrete walls, a distant crowd glow, cables overhead. Hard backlight silhouetting the figure, cool-to-warm grade. 35mm anamorphic, tracking behind. Volumetric haze, film grain, shallow depth of field, 24fps.
